name: matthew-a-carr/babysit-pr
description: Drive one PR to merge: monitor CI and automated review feedback (Copilot, Claude, Wiz/security scans, other bots), address comments (human + bot), push fixes, wait for CI to go green, then squash-merge. Use when a human says "babysit PR #NNN", "address the comments and merge when green", "get this PR landed", or just "babysit", "land", "ship", or "auto-merge" the PR. Pushes and merges — invoking it IS the authorization to do so. Refuses to merge on red CI, unresolved blocking reviews, open security findings, or conflicts; escalates instead.
